metadata.paper_title: Multi-Modal Digital Steganography: Classical and GAN-Based Approaches with Comprehensive Attack Robustness Analysis
metadata.ordering: Latest publication date first, earliest last
metadata.summary: All 12 remaining references are real, peer-reviewed, and verified via publisher pages. Body citations have been fully updated to use the new b1-b12 numbering scheme.

id_remapping_log.description: Mapping of old IDs (from previous version of paper) to new IDs (current version)
removed_from_old: old_b15 (Ronneberger 2015) — does not satisfy strictly post-2015

verification_workflow.step_1: Filtered all references to keep only those published after 2015
verification_workflow.step_2: Sorted remaining 12 references by publication date (latest first)
verification_workflow.step_3: Renumbered bibitems b1-b12 in latest-to-earliest order
verification_workflow.step_4: Updated all body citations to use new b1-b12 IDs
verification_workflow.step_5: Replaced citations to removed pre-2016 refs with appropriate post-2015 alternatives (e.g., b6 AlRusaini 2025 for steganalysis discussions)
verification_workflow.step_6: Verified all 12 cited refs match all 12 bibitems exactly (no orphans, no broken citations)
verification_workflow.step_7: All references re-verified via publisher pages and DOIs

equations_verification.location: Section III-D (Adversarial Training with H.264-Aware Noise Layer)
equations_verification.main_equation: L = lambda_1 * L_msg + lambda_2 * L_img + lambda_3 * L_adv

components.name: L_msg
components.interpretation: Binary cross-entropy between decoder output D(E(C,m)) and ground-truth message bits m
components.math_verification: Standard form: BCE(y_hat, y) = -[y*log(y_hat) + (1-y)*log(1-y_hat)] - mathematically correct

components.name: L_img
components.interpretation: Squared L2 norm (pixel-wise MSE) between stego E(C,m) and cover C

components.name: L_adv
components.interpretation: Non-saturating GAN generator loss against discriminator D_disc
components.math_verification: Standard non-saturating GAN loss form - mathematically correct

loss_weights.rationale: Prioritises bit recovery (lambda_1 highest), then visual fidelity (lambda_2), with light adversarial pressure (lambda_3 smallest)
